N_B02E_SOW_Left_20150701

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 73D
Recv ID: 73E
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 63
Func Name: SOW_left

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "1",
    "supplier": "440617",
    "soft": "0000",
    "version": "0000"
  }
]

Devices

[
  {
    "dtc": 23376,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "SOW RADAR FAILURE"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 53248,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "CAN COMM CIRCUIT"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 53264,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "CONTROL UNIT (CAN)"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 49412,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "LOST COMMUNICATION WITH ITS CONTROLLER(ADAS) (P-RUN)"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 50181,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "INVALID DATA RECEIVED FROM ITS CONTROLLER(ADAS) (CHECK SUM)"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 23377,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "HMI short circuit failure"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 23378,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "HMI open load / short to battery failure"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 23381,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "SOW RADAR STAIN"
  }
]
